---
title: "A reporting template for the OceanOmics Team"
author: ""
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
mail: ""
github: "Hobbeist"
home: "minderoo.org/oceanomics/"
logo: "minderoo.png"
output:
  oceanomicsR::oceanomics:
    toc: FALSE
    number_sections: FALSE
    code_folding: "hide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
